hero.title: Asya Oleynichenko
hero.text: Five years in product design. Now on upsell and offer personalization at VK: monetization for Mail Space, Cloud, and Mail. Previously ~1.5 years on Mail media (Mail Science, Hi-Tech, Cinema, Lady, Pets). Work spans research, hypotheses, A/B tests, design, and impact on LTV, conversion, retention, and ARPPU. DAFES AWARDS finalist & winner · HSE red diploma, GPA 8.82 (Design & Programming). Open to Senior Product Designer roles.

info.awardsValue: DAFES AWARDS finalist & winner · Avito Design & AI Cup (2025)

intro.name: Asya Oleynichenko
intro.lead1: Product designer at VK: monetization for Mail Space, Cloud, and Mail; before that — Mail media (Science, Hi-Tech, special projects). Five years across research, hypotheses, A/B tests, launches, and metrics.
intro.lead2: DAFES AWARDS finalist & winner; HSE red diploma (GPA 8.82). Open to Senior Product Designer roles and strong product teams.

skills.title: Skills
items: Product: research through hypothesis testing and metric impact
Hypotheses & experiments: A/B, analytics, data-informed decisions
Research: competitors, depth interviews, scenarios, growth points
Art direction: led Mail Media special projects
AI in production: Cursor, Midjourney in the pipeline, editorial training
Engineering literacy: basic coding (HSE), layout, partnering with dev

team.title: Team
team.body: I work in cross-functional teams with PMs, analytics, engineering, and researchers — from hypothesis to experiment readout

habitat.title: Beyond work
habitat.body: City life, music, internet visual noise, and an endless stream of references — where I recharge for interfaces and art direction

memes.title: Favorite memes by imaginary people
memes.body: A stash of absurd images and quotes without context — a reminder that products live in culture, not only in dashboards

mail-monetization.title: Mail monetization
mail-monetization.meta: Growth · Mail Space, Mail, Cloud · 2025 — present (separate team from 2026)
mail-monetization.desc: Series of experiments in Mail Space, Cloud, and Mail: plans, subscription entry points, freemium features, sharing limits
introParas: Growth monetization for the Mail.ru ecosystem. A series of experiments in Mail Space, Cloud, and Mail: plans, subscription entry points, freemium features, sharing limits.

mail-nauki.title: Mail media redesign & Mail Science launch
mail-nauki.desc: Mail Science launch as a new vertical + Media UI — base for redesigning the rest of the platform
introParas: Mail Media is five thematic products combining editorial content, recommendations, and ad integrations.
The goal was to launch Mail Science and use it as the base architecture for a systematic platform redesign.

racktables.title: RackTables — Objects page redesign
racktables.desc: Turning a passive DB into a decision-support tool for on-call engineers — in 2 days
introParas: Shipped in two days as part of Yandex Fast Track. The original RackTables interface behaved like a passive database: information was structured linearly with no priority logic. During incidents and outages that meant critical delays — engineers spent time manually searching and interpreting object state.

mail-spetsproekty.title: Growing the special-projects stream
mail-spetsproekty.desc: From manual production to a scalable process: 23 specials in 3 months, 20+ concepts for advertisers
introParas: I led the special-projects stream and built a scalable system for producing branded content — faster launches, higher throughput, and less reliance on contractors.

neural.title: Neural networks — Mail Hi-Tech editorial special
neural.desc: Interactive landing that proved the format and kicked off the branded-specials direction
introParas: An interactive landing that explains neural networks to a general audience: visual storytelling, AI illustrations, and an immersive format. After launch the format was scaled to commercial branded specials (see Biohacking and Growing the special-projects stream).

biohacking.title: Biohacking for Invitro
biohacking.desc: Branded interactive special: 3D motion, visual storytelling, native ad integration
introParas: A branded interactive special project: 3D animation, visual storytelling, and native ad integration. One of the first commercial projects in the new interactive-landing format at Mail.ru.

drop.title: DROP — app for city networking
drop.desc: Location-based communication: anonymous “traces” at physical city spots, Telegram MVP
introParas: DROP is a location-based communication platform that turns the city into a map of messages, stories, and micro-dialogues. Users leave a digital “trace” at a meaningful place (a park, a café, a street) as text, a voice clip, or a 3D object. Others who happen to be nearby can discover the note and start a conversation. Anonymity reduces social pressure, asynchrony removes the friction of the first contact, and the context of the place replaces the context of a profile.

loochok.title: LÒÒCHOK — media platform for customization and DIY community
loochok.desc: 0→1: research, MVP web + iOS, design system, business model, community launch
introParas: A dedicated platform where people find customization ideas, follow step-by-step tutorials, and share their work.
The project grew as a media ecosystem that brings content, community, and interaction tools together.

retrash.title: RE*TRASH — media service about mindful consumption
retrash.desc: Brand and web platform from scratch: research, concept, visual system, design system, launch
introParas: A media service that lowers the barrier to mindful consumption through structured content, step-by-step instructions, and a clear visual system — built across product, content, and brand.

inkz.title: INKZ — app for finding tattoo artists
inkz.desc: Full product cycle in 2 months: research → hypotheses → MVP → interactive prototype
introParas: INKZ is a tattoo-artist discovery platform concept built from scratch in two months. Hypothesis: reviews, ratings, and style-based search make it easier to pick an artist and build trust. The goal was an MVP that makes the search transparent and convenient.
